title: OrderCancelled
description: Published when an order is cancelled, either by customer request or by saga compensation. Triggers stock release (INV-ORD-009).

reason.description: Reason for cancellation. Determines compensation behavior downstream.

cancelledBy.description: Who initiated the cancellation. Affects refund eligibility and audit trail.

compensationRequired.description: True if this cancellation was triggered by saga compensation (payment_failed, stock_unavailable). Consumers use this to skip redundant compensation steps.

refundAmountCents.description: Amount to refund if payment was already captured. Null if no payment was taken.
